response.step_by_step_log: The video displays the title "Life is GAME" along with the text "Member Only After Live". The audio in the clip is instrumental background music, with no vocal performance. I performed a web search for '"Life is GAME" Japanese and English lyrics' to see if it was a known song with vocals, but found no specific vocal match that would apply to this clip. Since there is no vocal music, no lyrics were retrieved.
response.global_summary: The video features an anime-style character performing a song titled "Life is GAME" as part of a "Member Only After Live" event. There is no actual vocal performance in this specific clip, just background music, which fades to silence at the end before a brief "START" / "END" graphic.

scenes.description: An anime-style character performing on stage, holding a microphone. There is text on-screen indicating it is a "Member Only After Live" event, and a graphic on the right says "Life is GAME". The music playing is instrumental.
The screen fades to black, followed by a graphic that says "START" and then "END" inside a speech bubble.
